extended_help:
Owner-only command to grant every available item in the game.

**Usage:**
• `/giveall` — Give yourself 99x of all items
• `/giveall target:@user` — Give to another player
• `/giveall qty:1` — Give 1x each (for testing)

**Sources included:**
• Hunt drops, Explore items, Fish
• Dungeon & Boss drops
• All equipments, Cooked foods, Craft results

Items are upserted to the database and synced to the player's inventory. Ephemeral reply only.
